items.title: Silicon Valley legend Vinod Khosla has ‘no plans to leave California’ amid billionaire tax uproar—but he has another idea to fix the wealth loophole
items.description: Imagine a world where taxes just "go away" for everyone making less than $100,000 a year, Khosla told Fortune.

items.title: Korean startup Wrtn is on track to pass $100M in annual recurring revenue, riding a loneliness-epidemic-fueled boom in AI entertainment
items.description: Chief product officer Dong-jae Lee uses the analogy of a dungeon master for a tabletop RPG: The AI constructs a narrative in response to user choices.

items.title: SpaceX is poised to raise more money in its IPO than was raised in last year’s 90 IPOs combined
items.description: And that means Wall Street will make more money, too.

items.title: The Fidelity CEO’s surprise record as a crypto visionary
items.description: Fidelity’s Abigail Johnson has had the vision and courage to pursue a strategy even when her Big Finance peers shied away.

items.title: Polychain raises $200 million for fourth crypto VC fund, shakes up staff
items.description: The firm founded by Coinbase alum Olaf Carlson-Wee is shifting its focus.
